title: Tony's 3D Bookshelves
body:
This recourse pack will make bookshelves into 3d versions made by me!

Warning:
1. When using Optifine, make sure that connected textures is turned off. 
2. Don't use any mods or recourse packs that make bookshelves connect to other bookshelves

Not doing this will most likely result in glitched textures.

Now have fun with this nice and vanilla style recourse pack!
